prompt: Create a full-body studio fashion portrait of exactly one teenage streetwear skater standing casually on exactly one skateboard, facing slightly left with one hand in the hoodie pocket and a relaxed slouched pose. The character wears exactly six main outfit/accessory pieces: an oversized bright bubblegum pink graphic hoodie with black graffiti scribbles, light blue extremely baggy ripped jeans with multiple frayed knee and thigh tears, pink-and-white Nike-style sneakers with black laces, large over-ear headphones, a black backpack, and a silver wallet chain hanging from the jeans. Make the face intentionally anonymous with a smooth square blur block covering the facial features, while messy dark brown hair remains visible above it. Add visible decorative details: on the hoodie include exactly three smiley-face patches/pins, one black graffiti chest graphic, one yellow smiley patch on the front pocket, and one small rectangular patch near the hem; on the backpack include exactly four visible patches/pins, including two yellow smiley pins and two rectangular skate-brand-style patches. The skateboard should have an orange wooden deck with black grip edge, two visible trucks, and four small tan wheels, positioned under both feet. Use a warm beige seamless studio background, soft cinematic lighting from the front-left, subtle floor shadow, high-detail realistic 3D illustration style, crisp fabric texture, scuffed shoes, distressed denim, youthful urban skate aesthetic, vertical square composition, no extra people, no text captions, no watermark.
